name: vtsSetOutputMode
title: vtsSetOutputMode
description: Sets the mode for output on the channel.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Modes of VT2848 module: Values see eVTS2848OutputMode

description: The following example demonstrates how to use the PWM output of a VT2848 channel to simulate a PWM based sensor (e.g. a RPM sensor). The channel used in this example is called RPM_Sensor.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
